title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Quikr International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Quikr International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Quikr International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Quikr International Enterprises:
Quikr International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr International Enterprises!
